bot0:arena:kv:policy.reasoning: DodgeEagerness lowered slightly to reduce wasted dodges against bow spam; kiteRangeBias reduced to close distance on sword targets more effectively. ThreatAversion lowered to stop over-retreating from bow duels — we need to trade more aggressively. RetreatFireWhileKiting disabled because bow users a

lessons: GhostProtocol (bow) kills us in 3 of last 5 rounds — avoid open-field duels and use cover during bow-heavy rounds.
Sword users are our most vulnerable targets: we killed 8 sword-wielders in last 5 rounds with 0 deaths to them when we landed shots.
Hazard_storm rounds favor bow users who survive longer — prioritize mobility and avoid static positioning during storms.
Dagger users (Shredder, Viper) close distance fast and kill us in 2 of last 3 non-storm rounds — retreat or flank when they appear.
Bow mirror matches (vs GhostProtocol, HexMind) are losing: we have 12 deaths vs 4 kills to bow users overall.
Shield users (Fortress) are abundant but rarely engage — ignore them unless they initiate; focus on sword and bow threats.
bot0:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Spear has superior range and melee-punish capability against our dominant killers (GhostProtocol, Lancer) and dominates sword users we already excel at killing.

bot1:arena:kv:policy.reasoning: Dodge eagerness reduced slightly to avoid overusing dodge on non-critical threats (only 1 death from bow, but 4 from melee/grapple/spear). KiteRangeBias lowered to 2.0 to better pressure sword/grapple users while still maintaining safety. TargetThreatAversion reduced from 120→110 to allow more aggre

bot2:arena:kv:policy.reasoning: Reduced kiteRangeBias slightly to close pressure on staff users without overextending; lowered minTradeAdvantage and idleHealBelowHpFraction to engage more aggressively and avoid being trapped by grapplers; reduced targetThreatAversion slightly to stop over-prioritizing avoidance of high-threat bots

lessons: Valkyrie (spear) kills us 8 times in 30 rounds — always retreat on sight and avoid open areas.
Warden (sword) has 6 kills vs us; he closes distance fast — never let him get within 10m.
Bow wins 2/18 rounds; effective only when sword users are clustered — target groups, not solo foes.
Spear and grapple users dominate in hazard_storm — switch to shield or grapple when this modifier activates.
Fortress and Juggernaut (shield) are weak targets — we’ve killed them 13+8 times; prioritize them when unguarded.
Scorpion (grapple) kills us in fast_zone and hazard_storm — never stop moving in those modifiers.
bot1:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Shield is the only weapon with positive kill-to-death ratio against our top killers (Valkyrie, Warden) and dominates in hazard_storm where we’ve lost 3/3 rounds with bow.

lessons: Bow is effective against sword users (5 kills in round 17), but vulnerable to staff and grapple users who close range quickly.
Archmage (staff) killed us 3 times in recent rounds — avoid open areas and never trade shots with staff users.
Grapple users (Scorpion, Hook) are lethal in hazard_storm rounds — retreat immediately when they appear in storm modifiers.
Shield users are high-value targets: we killed 4 in round 17 while they had low visibility; prioritize them when they’re isolated.
Spear performed poorly in one round (1 kill, 1 death) — do not switch to spear unless facing heavy bow spam or long-range dominance.
In double_bounty and fast_zone modifiers, we died without kills — prioritize survival over aggression in high-pressure modifiers.
bot2:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Shield has the highest enemy weapon frequency (191 seen in round 11) and we’ve killed multiple sword users while they were shielding — it offers survivability against bow and staff spam.
